wizard.requestType.title: Select Safety Request Type
wizard.requestType.subtitle: Choose the service segment that matches your safety licensing or compliance requirements.
wizard.requestTypes.newLicense.title: New Safety License
wizard.requestTypes.newLicense.descripti: Obtain an official building occupancy or business safety certification.
Schedule regular preventative maintenance and safety systems tests.
wizard.requestTypes.technicalReport.desc: Request a detailed engineering safety check and formal technical report.
wizard.requestTypes.engineeringBlueprint: Submit civil architectural plans for mechanical & fire safety compliance reviews.
wizard.validation.invalidCr: Commercial Registration number must be 10 digits
wizard.validation.invalidArea: Facility area must be a positive number
wizard.validation.invalidPhone: Contact phone number must start with 05 and be 10 digits
wizard.validation.missingDocuments: Please upload all required documents before continuing.
wizard.validation.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a valid format.
wizard.validation.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size allowed is 5MB.
wizard.success.title: Request Submitted Successfully!
wizard.success.description: Your safety review request has been registered. The compliance workflow engine is routing your task.
wizard.facilityInfo.title: Facility & Contact Information
wizard.facilityInfo.subtitle: Provide accurate details about the physical location and commercial license of the facility.
wizard.facilityInfo.activityNamePlacehol: e.g. Commercial Kitchen or General Office Retail
wizard.facilityInfo.addressDescriptionPl: Street name, landmark details, building number
wizard.safetyRisk.title: Safety systems & Risk Checklist
wizard.safetyRisk.subtitle: Indicate what safety assets are already in place and declare potential hazard elements.
wizard.safetyRisk.equipmentDesc: Safety helmets, protective vests, safety signage.
wizard.safetyRisk.alarmDesc: Smoke detectors, heat sensors, alarm controls.
wizard.safetyRisk.extinguishersDesc: CO2/dry powder cylinders positioned near exits.
wizard.safetyRisk.exitsDesc: Clearly mapped and unobstructed exit pathways.
wizard.safetyRisk.gasDesc: Overriding Hazard Element: Instantly flags high risk.
wizard.safetyRisk.hazardousDesc: Overriding Hazard Element: Instantly flags high risk.
wizard.safetyRisk.notesPlaceholder: Describe any special conditions, access codes, or timing preferences...
wizard.safetyRisk.hazardWarningDesc: Because your facility declares gas extensions or hazardous storage elements, it will be classified under high-hazard review standards. Instant certification will be bypassed.
wizard.documents.title: Upload Required Documents
wizard.documents.subtitle: SaaS compliance workflows require the following certificates to verify facility dimensions.
wizard.documents.expectedFormats: Expected formats: {{formats}}. Verification is completed instantly by the system.
wizard.classification.title: Workflow Classification Engine
wizard.classification.subtitle: SSLM has analyzed your facility area and safety equipment checklist to route your request.
wizard.classification.fastTrackDesc: Instant digital certification flow allowed under basic municipal safety guidelines.
wizard.classification.maintenanceDesc: Requires scheduling a certified safety technician site visit before compliance verification.
wizard.classification.engineeringDesc: Requires deep architectural blueprint audits and formal engineering cost quotes.
wizard.classification.highHazardDesc: Overriding Risk Element Triggered: Requires on-site inspector verification and deep blueprint safety engineering review.
wizard.review.title: Review & Submit Request
wizard.review.subtitle: Carefully review your information. Submitting will register the request inside the backoffice system.
wizard.review.termsText: I confirm that the information and documents provided are accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge, and I understand that missing or incorrect information may delay the review process.
wizard.review.submitNotice: After submission, your request will be routed to the assigned review team. We may contact you if additional documents or information are required.
wizard.review.termsText.part1: I confirm that the information and documents provided are accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
wizard.review.termsText.part2: I understand that missing or incorrect information may delay the review process.
wizard.review.saveDraftSuccess: Draft saved successfully! You can resume from this step later.
classificationReason.high_hazard: High-risk activity overrides fast-track eligibility and requires engineering review.
classificationReason.fast_track: Small low-risk facility eligible for simplified processing.
classificationReason.maintenance: Facility size requires mandatory maintenance review.
classificationReason.engineering: Facility size requires full engineering evaluation.
classificationReason.FAST_TRACK: Small low-risk facility eligible for simplified processing.
classificationReason.MAINTENANCE: Facility size or service profile requires scheduled maintenance compliance review.
classificationReason.ENGINEERING: Facility size or technical requirements require full engineering evaluation.
classificationReason.HIGH_HAZARD: Hazardous activity or declared high-risk elements require enhanced safety review by a specialist safety engineer.
engineeringWorkspace.title: Engineering Review Workspace
engineeringWorkspace.subtitle: Detailed compliance check, plan markup, and workflow decisions.
engineeringWorkspace.warningNotAssigned: Warning: This request is not assigned to the Engineering Review queue.
engineeringWorkspace.returnReasonPlaceho: Provide reason for returning this request...
engineeringWorkspace.enterReasonError: Please enter a reason before returning to the client.
engineeringWorkspace.notesPlaceholder: Internal review notes and mechanical safety check observations...
engineeringWorkspace.noBlueprint: No blueprint document uploaded for this request.
engineeringWorkspace.quoteWorkflowNotice: Quotation workflow will be connected next.
engineeringWorkspace.reviewNotesDesc: Internal review notes and mechanical safety check observations.
engineeringWorkspace.returnDialogDesc: Specify the compliance reason for returning the request
engineeringWorkspace.successTransition: Request successfully approved and transitioned to Quotation phase.
wizard.classification.clientSubtitle: Based on your request details, the most appropriate review path has been selected.
wizard.classification.timelineHelper: Actual processing times may vary depending on document completeness and request requirements.
wizard.classification.bannerTitle: Your Review Path Has Been Determined
wizard.classification.bannerDesc: You're now ready to complete the final review before submitting your request.
wizard.classification.trackingReminder: You can monitor the progress of your request at any time through your Requests dashboard.
wizard.classification.fastTrackClientDes: Your request qualifies for an expedited review process. Our team will verify your documents and proceed with the approval process.
wizard.classification.maintenanceClientD: Your request requires standard compliance verification. A specialist will review your request and schedule a routine inspection.
wizard.classification.engineeringClientD: Your request requires additional engineering verification to ensure compliance. Your request will be assigned to a safety engineer for detailed review.
wizard.classification.highHazardClientDe: Your request requires an enhanced safety review based on the nature of the activity. A specialist safety engineer will inspect your details.
wizard.review.pathSummary.title: Review Path Summary
wizard.review.pathSummary.fastReviewNext: Our team will verify your documents and proceed with approval.
wizard.review.pathSummary.maintenanceRev: A specialist will review your request and schedule a routine inspection.
wizard.review.pathSummary.engineeringRev: Your request will be assigned to a safety engineer for detailed review.
wizard.review.pathSummary.enhancedSafety: A specialist safety engineer will review your request and contact you if additional information is needed.
wizard.success.titleSubmitted: Your request has been submitted successfully
quotations.queue.title: Quotations Queue
quotations.queue.description: Approved requests ready for quotation preparation.
quotations.queue.emptyDescription: Approved engineering reviews will appear here.
quotations.builder.title: Quotation Builder
quotations.builder.subtitle: Prepare and review quotation proposal for job
quotations.builder.itemsDescription: Configure pricing details and taxes for the proposal.
quotations.builder.noItems: No items added yet. Click Add Item or select a suggestion below.
quotations.builder.suggestionsDescriptio: Click to instantly add pre-defined safety compliance items.
quotations.builder.errNoItems: Please add at least one quotation item.
quotations.status.approvalInstructions: Quotation submitted for approval. Company Admin review is required before sending it to the client or confirming payment.
quotations.approvals.title: Quotation Approvals Queue
quotations.approvals.description: Review and approve commercial compliance service fee quotations.
quotations.approvals.emptyDesc: Outstanding quotations submitted for approval by engineers will appear here.
quotations.details.title: Review Quotation & Request Status
quotations.details.approveDialogDesc: This will approve the pricing breakdown and update the request stage to PAYMENT_CONFIRMED (representing Ready for Payment). Proceed?
quotations.details.requestChangesDialogD: Describe the changes or revisions required by the engineer. The quotation status will update to Changes Requested and the request stage will return to Quotation.
quotations.details.rejectDialogDesc: Provide the reason for rejecting this quotation. The request stage will return to Quotation.
nextStep.DRAFT: Please complete the wizard and submit the safety request to begin the compliance process.
nextStep.SUBMITTED: Waiting for compliance coordinator check and engineer queue assignment.
nextStep.SUBMITTED.FAST_TRACK: Waiting for customer service specialist to verify documents for fast-track processing.
nextStep.SUBMITTED.MAINTENANCE: Waiting for review coordinator check and routine inspection scheduling.
nextStep.SUBMITTED.ENGINEERING: Waiting for compliance coordinator check and engineering review queue assignment.
nextStep.SUBMITTED.HIGH_HAZARD: Waiting for compliance coordinator check and senior engineer review assignment.
nextStep.UNDER_REVIEW.MAINTENANCE: A specialist is scheduled to review your request and schedule a routine maintenance inspection.
nextStep.UNDER_REVIEW.ENGINEERING: The compliance engineer is auditing the safety blueprints and planning materials.
nextStep.UNDER_REVIEW.FAST_TRACK: Our team is performing a fast-track document check to proceed with instant approval.
nextStep.UNDER_REVIEW.HIGH_HAZARD: A specialist safety engineer is conducting an enhanced safety check on your request.
nextStep.QUOTATION: A quotation is prepared. Client payment verification is required to authorize the inspection.
nextStep.QUOTATION_APPROVAL: Quotation submitted for approval. Company Admin review is required before sending it to the client or confirming payment.
nextStep.READY_FOR_PAYMENT: Invoice has been issued. Client payment is required to start the project.
nextStep.PAYMENT_CONFIRMED: Payment confirmed. Awaiting compliance project initialization.
nextStep.PROJECT_CREATED: Official compliance project initialized. Preparing safety inspector field credentials.
nextStep.FIELD_EXECUTION: On-site safety systems installation and engineering testing in progress.
nextStep.FINAL_INSPECTION: On-site final regulatory safety audit inspection scheduled.
nextStep.COMPLETED: All safety regulations verified. Official compliance certificate issued.
details.invoiceMissing: Invoice record is missing. Please re-approve quotation or contact support to regenerate invoice.
details.alertInvoiceRegenerated: Invoice regenerated successfully from approved quotation!
details.alertFileLocked: This request is currently under review. Uploaded files are locked and read-only to preserve compliance records.
details.confirmFileReplace: Warning: This request has already been submitted for evaluation. Replacing documents may reset your review position. Do you want to proceed?
details.alertTransitionQuotation: Request successfully approved and transitioned to Quotation phase.
details.alertPaymentConfirmed: Mock payment confirmed successfully. Project has been initialized!
details.billingDesc: Confirm your payment to initialize the active safety compliance project.
details.promptReplaceFileName: Enter name of document file to replace:
timeline.comments.paymentConfirmed: Payment Confirmed. Safety compliance project has been initialized.
timeline.comments.executionStarted: Project Execution Started. Field team assigned.
timeline.comments.executionCompleted: Project execution completed. Awaiting final inspection.
timeline.comments.executionCompletedNote: Project execution completed. Ready for final inspection. Notes: {{notes}}
timeline.comments.insulationEngineer: Inspecting engineer assigned for blueprint audit.
timeline.comments.quotationSubmittedBy: Quotation submitted for review by {{user}}. Total: SAR {{total}}
